1) You need to have some task-management system. In that system you can prioritize your tasks.

2) You study in uni, so you have some classes. Use "Google Calendar" to manage them.

3) Combine similar tasks - then you will do all tasks faster.

4) Remember to get enouth sleep and to do sport well, cause it can bust your productivity.

I hope that some of my tips can help you."

- Uses "prioritize" - B1+
- Uses "productivity" - B1+

- Uses "combine similar tasks" - B1
- Uses "bust your productivity" (colloquial but effective) - B1

- "me to" should be "me too"

- "I will give you them" - word order issue
- "enouth" - spelling
- "do sport well" - "do sport" is acceptable but "exercise regularly" would be more natural
- "cause it can bust" - "cause" should be "because" or "as"; "bust" is colloquial for "boost"

- Uses numbered list format (good organization)
- Has discourse markers like "But" and "So"

- Clear and logical flow
